_comment: Mutation testing config. KNOWN LIMITATION: this package is ESM-only and Stryker's jest-runner does not currently discover tests via Jest's findRelatedTests path-matcher when combined with ts-jest/default-esm preset (similar to github.com/stryker-mutator/stryker-js issue #4227 / #5049). The scaffold is retained so that when the underlying issue resolves (or when the project has a non-TS config target for Stryker), mutation runs can be enabled. Run with `npm run test:mutate` once that's fixed.
